positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric representation of a wise, stylized fox sitting within a circular woodland pattern. The fox is rendered with sharp, clean lines and bold color blocking, suggesting both elegance and playfulness. The surrounding woodland features highly stylized, simplified flora and fauna silhouettes (leaves, mushrooms, stylized birds) arranged symmetrically to form a cohesive, tattoo-style pattern. The overall style should be modern kawaii meets Art Deco engraving, utilizing a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, forest green, and creamy ivory. Composition must be centered, emphasizing a strong, negative space flow suitable for screen printing or apparel placement. High contrast, clean vector aesthetic, linework must be crisp and continuous.
negative: blur, grain, noise, photorealism, text, watermark, signature, debris, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, muddy colors, dirty, low detail, grayscale, fuzzy
